sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom_101: Combinational ROM that exposes the exact 101 signed Q15 benchmark coefficients as a flattened bus.
sub_modules.fir_tap_pair_adder: Combinational symmetric tap pre-adder for mirrored FIR samples.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate engine using 50 symmetric pair sums plus the center tap with a signed 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.fir_q15_normalizer: Combinational Q15 output normalization using arithmetic right shift by 15 into the DUT output width.
